recommendations.title: Drunken Master
recommendations.overview: After getting into trouble, a mischievous young man is sent to train under a brutal, but slovenly old beggar, who teaches him the secret of the Drunken Fist.

recommendations.title: Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon: Sword of Destiny
recommendations.overview: A story of lost love, young love, a legendary sword and one last opportunity at redemption.

recommendations.title: Iron Monkey

recommendations.title: Snake in the Eagle's Shadow

recommendations.title: Tai-Chi Master

recommendations.title: True Legend

recommendations.title: Ip Man 2

recommendations.title: Made in Hong Kong

recommendations.title: Ip Man
recommendations.overview: A semi-biographical account of Yip Man, the first martial arts master to teach the Chinese martial art of Wing Chun. The film focuses on events surrounding Ip that took place in the city of Foshan between the 1930s to 1940s during the Second Sino-Jap

recommendations.title: Crippled Avengers
recommendations.overview: A group of martial artists seek revenge after being crippled by Tu Tin-To, a martial arts master, and his son.
